## Tesla reports negative free cash flow in Q2 as AI and robotics capital spending intensifies

Negative FCF is the sharpest near-term financial risk in Tesla's print; sustainability of the AI/robotics capex cycle now depends on Cybercab and Optimus reaching revenue-generating milestones before liquidity becomes a constraint — watch for any management commentary on FCF breakeven timing.

- Tesla generated negative free cash flow in Q2, per two outlets confirming the same headline.
- Optimus factory build-out and Cybercab ramp explicitly named as drivers of the cash burn.
- Stock slipped in after-hours trading on the FCF miss.
- Cash burn pace is now a front-line risk metric alongside EPS and margins for the Tesla AI-pivot thesis.
